title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Spencer's Retail

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Spencer's Retail
jsonLd.description:
Join the Spencer's Retail family as a SEO Specialist in Jaipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Spencer's Retail:
Spencer's Retail is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spencer's Retail!
